meta.title: Updates - Mingrun Tech
hero.title: Product updates and changelog.
timeline.0.title: Product page redesign
timeline.0.body: Rebuilt visual design and interactions. Page layouts restructured with v2 design system, GSAP scroll animations, and responsive improvements.
timeline.1.title: Demo improvements
timeline.1.body: Product viewer front and center with optimized 3D interactions. Added scene modes, exploded view, and X-ray. Reduced inference latency.
timeline.2.title: Security hardening
timeline.2.body: CSRF protection, rate limiting, and signed URLs now live. All API endpoints rate-limited, static assets served with managed signatures.
